case_title: HOFFMAN PROPERTIES VS. DOUGLAS WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOFFMAN PROPERTIES SERVED AUG-18-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-19-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, DOUGLAS AN INDIVIDUAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOFFMAN PROPERTIES SERVED AUG-19-2019, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOFFMAN PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, DOUGLAS AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2715 CABRILLO STREET, GARAGE SPACE G12, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOFFMAN PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, DOUGLAS AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
